testsuite.name: tests.GoogleTest
testsuite.system-err: [Test worker] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 145.0.7632.117 (resolved driver for Chrome 145) [Test worker] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.online.Downloader - Downloading https://storage.googleapis.com/chrome-for-testing-public/145.0.7632.117/win64/chromedriver-win64.zip [Test worker] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.online.Downloader - Extracting driver from compressed file chromedriver-win64.zip [Test worker] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as C:\Users\roberta\.cache\selenium\chromedriver\win64\145.0.7632.117\chromedriver.exe mar. 12, 2026 12:00:01 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 mar. 12, 2026 12:00:01 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.7632.160. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.20.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
